question: Will Apple mention Google or Gemini in its WWDC 2026 keynote?
textDescription: This market resolves YES if Apple's WWDC 2026 keynote includes a spoken or on-screen mention of either "Google" or "Gemini". Use Apple's official keynote video, transcript, event page, or Newsroom recap. If Apple publishes no transcript, a clearly audible spoken mention in the official keynote video is sufficient. A Google/Gemini mention outside the main keynote does not count unless Apple also included it in the keynote itself. Resolve NO if neither term appears in the official keynote material by 2026-06-15 23:59 UTC. Sources / resolver surfaces: - Apple WWDC: https://developer.apple.com/wwdc26/ - Apple Events: https://www.apple.com/apple-events/
